nasb.text: Assuredly, the evil man will not go unpunished, But the descendants of the righteous will be delivered.

esv.text: Be assured, an evil person will not go unpunished, but the offspring of the righteous will be delivered.

cnv.text: 惡人必不免受罰， 但義人的後裔必蒙解救。

ccb.text: 恶人终必落入法网， 义人的子孙必得拯救。

csbs.text: 恶人必然难逃罪责， 但义人的后裔必蒙拯救。
